metadata.description: Document-based project control for AI-human collaboration. A Claude Code skill that lets any agent resume work from files alone — no external memory needed.

plugins.name: doc-harness
plugins.description: Document-based project control (English). Tracks progress across sessions, detects interrupted phase transitions, and coordinates multiple projects via file-based inbox/outbox. Commands: /doc-harness init, /doc-harness check.

plugins.name: doc-harness-zh
plugins.description: 基于文档的项目控制系统（中文版）。让任何 AI 智能体仅通过读取文件即可恢复项目工作状态。命令：/doc-harness init、/doc-harness check。
